Package minum.database

Class SimpleDataTypeImpl<T>

minum.database.SimpleDataTypeImpl<T>

    • deserializeHelper

      protected List<String> deserializeHelper(String serializedText)
      Splits up a string based on a pipe character. See StringUtils.tokenizer(String, char)
      Parameters:
      serializedText - the string we are splitting into tokens
